summary: TWO_COLUMN: two ValueTrackers (α, β) drive the Beta pdf via always_redraw, plus a red dashed mean line at μ=α/(α+β). Tour through (1,1) uniform → (2,2) bell → (5,2) left-skewed → (2,5) right-skewed → (0.5,0.5) U-shape → back to (2,2). Right column shows live α, β, μ, mode, and the formula.
